name: Google Docs
description: Create, read, append to, and replace text in Google Docs using the connected Google account.

toolDeclarations.name: create_google_doc
toolDeclarations.description: Create a new Google Doc, optionally with initial body text.

toolDeclarations.name: read_google_doc
toolDeclarations.description: Read plain text from a Google Doc.

toolDeclarations.name: append_google_doc_text
toolDeclarations.description: Append plain text to the end of a Google Doc.

toolDeclarations.name: replace_google_doc_text
toolDeclarations.description: Replace all matching text in a Google Doc. Useful for placeholders like {{name}}.

findText.description: Exact text to find, such as {{client_name}}.
